PathnamesPage.description:
The pathnames are internationalized too.

If you're using the default language English, you'll see /en/pathnames in the browser address bar on this page.

If you change the locale to German, the URL is localized accordingly (/de/pfadnamen).
PathnamesPage.title: Pathnames

hero.title: Multilingual Brand Communication Solutions
hero.subtitle: We help brands connect with their audience through strategic communication

services.title:
Empowering
Brand Growth
services.subtitle: Our Services
services.description: Whether for emerging brands seeking to break through or established brands aiming to refresh their image, we craft customized communication pathways. From brand strategy to on-the-ground execution, we provide comprehensive communication solutions, ensuring every investment generates tangible and perceptible brand value.

clients.title: Partnering with Exceptional Brands
clients.subtitle: Our Clients
clients.description: We are more than just service providers; we are long-term partners on your brand's growth journey. From startup to maturity, from local to global, we accompany every brand's transformative journey with professionalism and passion.

connecting.title: Bridging Cultures, Connecting Globally
connecting.description: Founded in Toronto, Canada, and developed in Beijing, B&D Media operates with a dual-hub strategy spanning East and West. We deeply integrate multicultural perspectives to craft communication strategies with global resonance. Through the three-dimensional empowerment of strategic consulting, creative storytelling, and digital technology, we help brands transcend geographical boundaries and achieve precise dialogues on the global stage.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.description: We work with clients across various sectors including technology, finance, healthcare, retail, and more

news.title:
Spotting Trends
Staying Ahead of
the Curve
news.subtitle: News
news.description: In a rapidly evolving communication landscape, we consistently stay at the forefront of the industry. From international trends to local practices, B&D Media continuously outputs innovative insights and practical results, providing brands with forward-thinking solutions.

AboutPage.title: Make Communication More Than Just Communication
AboutPage.subtitle: B&D Media: Global Strategy, Local Expertise

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: Founded in Toronto, Canada in 2004, B&D Media officially entered the Chinese market in 2018, establishing a localized team in Beijing. Operating under the core principle of "Message Matters," we integrate cutting-edge technology with innovative strategies to create truly effective communication solutions for brands.

mission.title: Our Philosophy
mission.description: In an era of information overload, mere exposure is no longer enough. We believe that only content that precisely resonates with consumer emotions can spark genuine connection and create lasting brand impact. Therefore, we focus not only on the breadth of communication but also on the depth of content – ensuring every message accurately reaches its target audience, delivering measurable business value.

advantage.title: Our Advantages
advantage.advantage1_description: Execution: Combining North American theories with the nuances of the Chinese market to provide customized communication strategies.
advantage.advantage2_description: Communications: Building comprehensive brand visibility across channels, from social media to offline events.
advantage.advantage3_description: Optimization: Continuously improving communication ROI based on in-depth user behavior analysis.

member1.name: John Doe
member1.description: John Doe is the CEO and founder of B&D Media. He has over 20 years of marketing experience. He graduated from Tsinghua University, and obtained a master's degree in business administration. Before joining B&D Media, he worked in many well-known companies, including Alibaba, Tencent and Baidu.

He graduated from Tsinghua University, and obtained a master's degree in business administration. Before joining B&D Media, he worked in many well-known companies, including Alibaba, Tencent and Baidu.

He graduated from Tsinghua University, and obtained a master's degree in business administration. Before joining B&D Media, he worked in many well-known companies, including Alibaba, Tencent and Baidu.

WorksPage.title: B&D Media Case Studies
WorksPage.subtitle: Reshaping Brand Expression Through Story, Driving Innovation with Data.
WorksPage.description_01: We partner with leading brands across technology, finance, FMCG, luxury, healthcare, and more, helping them transcend cultural boundaries to create deeply resonant communication experiences. From strategic planning to creative execution, every case study embodies B&D Media's commitment to the "Message Matters" philosophy.
WorksPage.description_02: Whether it's the localisation of international brands or the global expansion of local brands, we leverage our extensive cross-industry experience, multicultural perspectives, and data-driven mindset to consistently deliver measurable business value for partners across diverse sectors.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.contactIntro: Have questions or want to learn more? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Name
form.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: An error occurred while submitting your message. Please try again.

Footer.title: Footer
Footer.description: Founded in 2004, B&D Media is a creative agency specializing in influential brand communication. We combine strategy, narrative, and technology to help brands connect with audiences through video production, digital content, and integrated marketing.

location1.address: 5008-66 Wellington St W, Toronto, ON M5K 1A1. Canada

location2.address: 508, Building 8, Heshoulin, Wangjing, Chaoyang District, Beijing, China
